meeting_name: 嘉義市議會第 11 屆第 3 次定期會模擬紀錄
agenda_item: 市區道路安全與停車動線專案報告
raw_text_excerpt: 本段為模擬公開會議紀錄內容，討論市區道路安全、停車動線與行人環境改善。 交通處說明將盤點學校周邊路口，並提出改善時程供議會後續追蹤。
review_notes: Sample manual review confirms fixture fields are internally consistent; not an official conclusion.
source_context: Fixture-only public sample derived from https://www.cycc.gov.tw/public/minutes/sample.html; not a formal CYCC dataset.
public_use_notes: sample data, not official conclusion; requires manual policy review before public use.

meeting_name: 嘉義市議會第 11 屆第 4 次定期會模擬紀錄
agenda_item: 人行空間與排水改善專案報告
raw_text_excerpt: 本段為模擬公開會議紀錄文字，討論人行空間、騎樓整平與排水改善。 建設處說明將依公開會議紀錄所列議題，整理改善順序並回報後續處理進度。
review_notes: Sample manual review confirms fixture fields are internally consistent; not an official conclusion.
source_context: Fixture-only public sample derived from https://www.cycc.gov.tw/public/minutes/sample.pdf; not a formal CYCC dataset.
public_use_notes: sample data, not official conclusion; requires manual policy review before public use.
